race.description: Profiling, It's What We Do! Hcp (C2)
race.comment: SCHEHERAZADE (4) is lightly raced but has strung back-to-back wins together over two campaigns and has revved up for this with a recent trial placing. Winning rider Turner sticks in the saddle and looks to have plenty of upside. Goes on top. MAURRAQA (9) won on debut at Ballina and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Don't dismiss lightly. READY TO IGNITE (6) has trialled well for his return and rates well off the back of his best form last time in. Prone to mixing his form, but still has to be included in his return. IMMEDIATE (10) hasn't been far off the mark in recent outings and maps to settle closer.
